name: graphnosis
description: Enriches every Copilot Chat prompt with context from your private, encrypted Graphnosis Cortex. Nothing leaves your device.

chatParticipants.name: graphnosis
chatParticipants.description: Search and save to your private, encrypted Graphnosis memory Cortex

graphnosis.httpBridgeUrl.description: URL of the Graphnosis local HTTP MCP bridge. Copy from Graphnosis Settings → VS Code.

graphnosis.bearerToken.markdownDescription: Bearer token for the Graphnosis HTTP bridge. Copy from **Graphnosis Settings → VS Code**.

graphnosis.autoInject.description: Register graphnosis_recall as an LM tool so Copilot can call it automatically on relevant queries (VS Code 1.97+).

enumDescriptions: Only public-tier graph content is included in auto-injection.
Public and personal-tier graph content is included (default).
graphnosis.autoInjectMaxTier.description: Sensitivity ceiling for auto-injection. Graphs above this tier are excluded.

graphnosis.maxTokensPerInjection.description: Token budget passed to recall on each auto-injection or @graphnosis query.
